# QQC Backtest Project

This repository contains QQC (Quantified Quality Composite) factor backtesting scripts.

## Project Structure

- `qqc_backtest/` - Backtest scripts and data
- `data/` - Stock data downloaded from akshare
- `results/` - Backtest results and reports

## Usage

```bash
python qqc_backtest/qqc_backtest_final.py
```

## Data Source

- A-share stock data: akshare
- Index data: CSI 300 (000300)
- Time range: 2011-2020

## Generated by

Cursor Cloud API with opus4.6 model
